MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Executors and the Attorney to appear on June 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition for Final Distribution have not been filed. Status on close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
